profile.description: Balanced crawl and safe OWASP-aligned scan.

notes: Safe automated checks only; manual validation is still required for medium-confidence findings.
Destructive exploit attempts, brute force checks, data extraction, and SSRF testing are intentionally excluded.
Run an Authenticated scan with approved session cookies or headers to cover logged-in workflows.
The safe probe limit was reached; increase the profile limits only for authorized lab-style targets.
Exclude-path filters were applied, so matching paths were intentionally skipped.

fixed_findings.evidence: X-Frame-Options header is missing. The site may be vulnerable to clickjacking.
